item.title: How to Test Google Polymer elements on Travis CI
item.description: How to run a headless Firefox on Travis CI via Xvfb

item.title: JSConf 2015: Headless Testing Against Real Web Browsers
item.description: An overview of my JSConf 2015 talk on headlessly testing against real web browsers.
